title: Interlace
description: Interlaced-video artifacts as a live filter. A real interlaced signal captures the even and odd scanlines a field apart in time, so anything moving combs into feathered teeth along its edges. Blends the two time-offset fields, adds a horizontal field shear to exaggerate the comb, scanline darkening, and a de-interlace bob. Field size, comb shear, scanlines and field order are live and mappable — works on a camera, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or the layers below.
